tldr: Jay Vine took the GC by winning the queen stage on Corkscrew Road's second ascent. UAE delivered a 1-2 with Narváez in the front group; Schmid the best non-UAE result at +1:05.

narrative.headline: Vine wins the queen stage, takes the GC
narrative.body: 148.1 km, 3,624 m elevation, Norton Summit → Mt Lofty → Corkscrew Road. The second Corkscrew was decisive — Vine attacked, only Narváez could go with him in the UAE 1-2. Schmid limited his GC damage to a minute by riding the chase from the second group.

gcImpact.headline: Vine takes the leader's jersey
gcImpact.body: Vine moved into the overall lead with a stage win + a minute-plus on principal GC threats. Held it to Adelaide.
